hooks.prompt:
You are maintaining ARCHITECTURE.md and CHANGELOG.md for the Fillit Design Lab project at /Users/samo/DesignLab/fillit-design-lab.

First, check what changed this session:
  git -C /Users/samo/DesignLab/fillit-design-lab diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null

If the output is empty or only contains ARCHITECTURE.md/CHANGELOG.md, output {"continue": true} and stop — no update needed.

If meaningful files changed, do BOTH of the following:

--- 1. UPDATE ARCHITECTURE.md ---
Read the existing ARCHITECTURE.md, then read whichever files are relevant to what changed:
- config/platforms.ts
- composables/
- components/app-sidebar.vue, components/right-panel.vue
- components/ui/input/FloatingLabelInput.vue, components/ui/select/FloatingLabelSelect.vue
- pages/preview/ (list directory)
- server/api/ and server/data/ (list directories)

Update only the sections that changed. Keep the existing structure:
# Fillit Design Lab — Architecture
## Stack
## Project structure
## Platform configuration (config/platforms.ts)
## Pages  (table: Route | File | Description)
## Shared components  (name, path, purpose, props/slots)
## Composables  (name, purpose, key exports)
## Data layer  (API routes + JSON files)
## UI patterns
_Last updated: [today's date]_

--- 2. UPDATE CHANGELOG.md ---
Read the existing CHANGELOG.md. Get the recent commit(s) for this session:
  git -C /Users/samo/DesignLab/fillit-design-lab log --oneline --format="%ad %s" --date=short -5 2>/dev/null

Prepend a new entry at the top (below the # Changelog heading) in this format:

## YYYY-MM-DD
- Short bullet describing what was built/changed (feature-focused, not commit-message-focused)
- Max 5 bullets. Group related things. Skip doc-only changes.

Do not modify existing entries.

After writing both files, output {"continue": true}.
